refund.title: Tagasimaksepoliitika
refund.intro: At Chatforia, me strive et provide  high-quality teenus et kõik kasutajad. This Refund Poliitika outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Tellimused
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions on billed sisse advance on  recurring basis. Sina may cancel at any time through your konto seaded või  platform used et purchase.

eligibility.title: Tagasimakse sobivus
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted jaoks duplicate charges, billing errors, või technical issues preventing access et paid features. Kõik requests on reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Tagastamatu
nonRefundable.body: Me generally do not provide refunds jaoks unused time, partial subscription periods, või failure et cancel before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Kolmanda osapoole ostud
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as  Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Kontakt
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

whyMessaging.title: Miks sõnumiplatvormid on tähtsamad kui kunagi varem
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one   most important tools jaoks communication sisse today’s world. From personal conversations et business interactions, messaging apps allow people et stay connected instantly ja efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Inimesed rely on messaging apps jaoks daily communication koos sõbrad, family, ja colleagues. Whether it's  quick update või  long vestlus, messaging provides  convenient ja flexible way et stay sisse touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One   main advantages  messaging platforms on their speed. Sõnumid on delivered instantly, allowing kasutajad et communicate sisse real time. This level  convenience has made messaging  preferred method  communication jaoks many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across  globe. With internet access, kasutajad saab communicate regardless  location, making it easier et build relationships ja collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus on giving kasutajad control over their data ja conversations. Funktsioonid like encryption, privacy seaded, ja message controls allow kasutajad et communicate koos confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues et evolve koos uus features such as AI-powered responses, tõlge, ja multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms hakkab become even rohkem powerful ja versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia on built koos these principles sisse mind, offering  fast, secure, ja user-friendly messaging experience jaoks  connected world.

global.title: Ülemaailmse suhtluse tulevik
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over  past few decades. What once nõutav phone kõned või sisse-person meetings saab nüüd be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues et advance, global communication on becoming faster, rohkem accessible, ja rohkem inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One   biggest changes sisse communication on  reduction  geographic barriers. Inimesed saab nüüd connect koos others across  world sisse near real time. Whether jaoks personal conversations, business, või collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far vähem limiting.
global.translationDesc: Keel has traditionally been one   biggest obstacles et global communication. Today, built-sisse tõlge tools help bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow kasutajad et communicate rohkem easily even if they speak different keeled, creating uus opportunities jaoks connection ja understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed on  key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect sõnumid et be delivered quickly, ja modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables rohkem natural ja fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes rohkem digital, privacy ja security on increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations on kaitstud. Funktsioonid like encryption ja user-controlled seaded help tugi  rohkem secure communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future  global communication hakkab likely include rohkem advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved tõlge, ja enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication hakkab jätka et become rohkem intuitive ja accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia on part  this shift, helping people connect rohkem easily across keeled ja borders.

index.title: Chatforia blogi
index.intro: Explore insights on communication, online safety, ja how messaging technology on connecting people around  world.

howItWorks.title: Kuidas Chatforia töötab
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia on designed et make communication simple, fast, ja accessible. Getting started takes just  few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email või username et create your Chatforia konto.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect koos others by selecting kontaktid või starting uus chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Sõnumid on delivered quickly et provide  smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-sisse tõlge helps kasutajad communicate across different keeled.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Halda your eelistused, kontaktid, ja communication seaded.

safety.title: Ohutus- ja kogukonnajuhised
safety.intro: Chatforia on committed et maintaining  safe ja respectful environment jaoks kõik kasutajad. These guidelines help ensure  positive experience jaoks everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users on expected et communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, või harmful behavior on not permitted.
safety.enforcementDesc: Me may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, või permanent removal alates  platform.

profile.errSmsDest: Vali at least one destination (phone või email).

profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens on always matched only koos other teens. Adults cannot be matched koos teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: For safety, accounts sisse  13–17 age range saab only be matched koos other 13–17 accounts sisse Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things sa tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: When this on on, Foria saab use your past Random Chat conversations (just koos sa) et keep  vestlus flowing. Sina saab turn this off any time.

profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Used when your heli greeting on pole saadaval.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails alates your Chatforia numbrid hakkab be stored sisse your Kõnepost inbox. Sina saab luba transcription ja forwarding sisse supported plans.
profile.portHint: Want et keep your current number? Sina saab port it into Chatforia Traadita.

premium.description: Ava võimsad funktsioonid ja eemalda reklaamid.

upgrade.title: Uuenda
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Alusta koos our tasuta, ad-supported plan. Go ad-tasuta koos Plus, või ava full power features koos Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Vali  rakendus plan, add andmepaketts jaoks yourself, või share data koos your family — kõik alates one place.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Alusta koos our tasuta, ad-supported plan. Go ad-tasuta koos Plus, või ava full power features koos Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Lisa global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even when sa’re away alates Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Loo  jagatud andmemaht jaoks your family ja manage everyone’s usage alates one place.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Ava võimsad funktsioonid ja eemalda reklaamid.

free.title: Tasuta
free.desc: Alusta messaging jaoks tasuta. Ideal if sa’re just trying Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 ja grupp vestlus, plus hääl- ja videokõned
features.media: Share fotod, hääl sõnumid, ja short videod
features.ai: AI-powered nutikad vastused ja instant tõlge (fair use)
features.disappearing: Kaduvad sõnumid ja basic privacy controls
features.ads: Tasuta forever koos ads sisse  rakendus

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Kõik  essentials, ilma ads. Great jaoks everyday messaging ja calling.

features.forwarding: Forward kõned ja sõnumid et your real telefoninumber
features.support: Faster tugi when something goes wrong

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Kuu kaupa)
premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, ja prioriteetne tugi.

features.themes: Unlock kõik premium color themes ja rakendus customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools jaoks rewrites, nutikad vastused, ja summaries
features.support: Priority tugi when sa need help most

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Aastane)
premiumAnnual.desc: Salvesta rohkem when billed aastas — including extra color themes, AI tools, ja prioriteetne tugi.

features.allPremium: Everything sisse Premium Kuu kaupa — including extra color themes
features.save25: Salvesta around 30% compared et paying kuu kaupa
features.bestFor: Best jaoks power kasutajad, remote workers, ja heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Salvesta 30% koos aastane – jätka et login
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Arveldatakse ette. Tühista igal ajal. Varjatud tasusid pole.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, ja AI power tools.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobiil (eSIM andmepaketts)
mobile.subtitle: Lisa global data et keep Chatforia working even ilma Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your riik ja currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick  one-time global andmepakett so Chatforia keeps working when sa’re traveling või away alates Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Me don’t sell andmepaketts under 3 GB.

features.throttle: Kiirus võib suure kasutuse järel aeglustuda

disclaimer.devices: eSIM andmepaketts require  eSIM-compatible ja avatud device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, ja riik. Coverage ja speeds vary by region.

small.title: Stardipakett
small.desc: Includes 3 GB  high-speed data — ideal jaoks light messaging ja occasional kõned.
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, ja occasional kõned

medium.title: Reisipakett
medium.desc: Includes 5 GB  high-speed data jaoks trips, commuting, ja regular VoIP kõned.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP kõned, ja maps

large.title: Võimsuspakett
large.desc: Includes 10 GB  high-speed data jaoks heavy vestlus, kõned, ja video on  Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy vestlus, kõned, video, ja hotspot use

compare.title: Võrdle eSIM-andmepakette
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how sa use Chatforia (hääl, video, meedia, ja other apps on your phone).

family.title: Chatforia Pere (shared data)
family.subtitle: Share  single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, ülemaailmne katvus.

small.title: Pere Väike
small.desc: Includes 20 GB  shared high-speed data — great jaoks 2–3 light kasutajad.

medium.title: Pere Keskmine
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB  shared high-speed data — ideal jaoks 3–5 aktiivne members.

large.title: Pere Suur
large.desc: Includes 80 GB  shared high-speed data — jaoks power families that on always online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool jaoks your family
feature.fairUse: Subject et mõistliku kasutuse poliitika ja local limits

family.disclaimer: Pere packs create või top up  jagatud andmemaht. Sina saab invite ja remove members anytime.
family.footnote: Pere packs share  single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability ja limits depend on your riik ja kohalikud eeskirjad.

why.title: Miks inimesed Chatforiasse üle lähevad
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives sa  real telefoninumber, smart tõlge, ja  clear path et go ad-tasuta when sa’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Tasuta,  simple Plus upgrade when sa’re ready, ja Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Hääl
voice.body: Modern rakendus, global-first design, ja built-sisse tõlge instead  vana-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs vestlus apps
messengers.body: Text real telefoninumbers — not just other rakendus kasutajad — koos AI ja status built sisse. Great if sa’re coming alates apps like TextFree või TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly saadaval information ja may change over time. Other tasuta-texting apps like TextFree või TextMe on generally similar et TextNow.

free.a: Jah. The Tasuta plan includes  Chatforia number, calling, ja messaging koos ads. Sina saab stay on Tasuta as long as sa like, või upgrade et remove ads ja ava rohkem features.

plusPremium.q: What’s  difference between Plus ja Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads ja extends your sõnumite ajalugu — perfect jaoks everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools jaoks rewrites ja replies, ja prioriteetne tugi jaoks heavy kasutajad.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobiil uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your riik ja device. Sina’ll see supported options during activation inside  rakendus.

cancel.q: Can I cancel või change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Jah. Sina saab manage või cancel your subscription alates  billing page sisse  rakendus. Changes take effect at  end  your praegune arveldusperiood.

family.a: Pere packs create  jagatud andmemaht across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays  bill, ja sa saab invite või remove members ja set limits per person.

gettingStarted.title: Alustamine
gettingStarted.subtitle: Uus et Chatforia? This quick start shows  essentials so sa saab be productive sisse minutes.

alert.text: This guide hakkab grow as me launch uus features. If something’s missing, let us know via

section2.title: 2) Alusta messaging
section2.item1: Loo  DM või Group ja send your first message.
section2.item2: Use instant tõlge et vestlus across 100+ keeled.
section2.item3: Proovi kaduvad sõnumid ja lugemiskinnitused sisse Profiil → Privaatsus.

section3.title: 3) Mine edasi
section3.item1: Sina saab upgrade et  paid plan anytime inside  rakendus.
section3.item2: Once sa’re signed sisse, sa saab link additional devices ja set up encrypted backups alates Seaded sisse  rakendus.

account.q: How do I create või recover my konto?
account.a: Laadi alla  rakendus või use veeb, tap “Loo konto”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Jah. Sõnumid ja kõned on end-et-end encrypted by default. Only sa ja  recipient saab read them.

translate.a: Luba “Automaatne tõlge” sisse Seaded → Appearance & Keel. Me translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs koos minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include kuvatõmmised ja your rakendus versioon.

contact.title: Võta meiega ühendust
contact.errorSend: Ei saanud saata. Palun kirjuta aadressile support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privaatsus Poliitika explains how Chatforia (“me”, “us”) collects, uses, ja shares information when sa use our apps ja services. Me design Chatforia et minimize  data me saab access.

infoWeCollect.title: Kogutav teave
infoWeCollect.account: Konto info (e.g., email/phone) et create ja secure your konto.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Krüpteeritud content (sõnumid/calls) on end-et-end encrypted; me saab’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device kirjuta, või coarse analytics et improve performance.

sms.title: Mobiil telefoninumbers ja SMS
sms.body: If sa vali et provide  mobile telefoninumber, me use it et luba features such as konto verification, login alerts, ja user-et-user messaging via SMS where supported. Me may send transactional SMS sõnumid related et your konto ja activity on Chatforia. Sina saab opt out  receiving SMS sõnumid at any time by replying koos  supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) või by changing your notification eelistused sisse  rakendus. Me do not sell your telefoninumber või use it jaoks unrelated marketing.

howWeUse.title: Kuidas me teavet kasutame
howWeUse.provide: Provide ja secure  teenus (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Jagamine
sharing.body: Me don’t sell personal data. Me may share limited data koos processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Sinu õigused
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), sa may request access, correction, deletion, või opt-out  certain processing. Kontakt: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Andmete säilitamine ja turvalisus
retention.body: Me retain only what’s needed et operate  teenus ja apply industry-standard security. E2E content saab’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Lapsed
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed et children under 13 (või as nõutav by your local law).

changes.title: Muudatused
changes.body: Me’ll post updates here ja revise  “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Kontakt
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia sa agree et these Tingimused. If sa do not agree, don’t use  teenus.

accounts.title: Kontod
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info ja keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Sina’re responsible jaoks activity on your konto.

acceptableUse.title: Lubatud kasutus
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Ei illegal, abusive, või infringing content; no spam või automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS-suhtlus
sms.body: If sa provide  mobile telefoninumber, sa agree that Chatforia may send sa SMS sõnumid related et your konto ja use   teenus, such as login alerts, security notifications, ja sõnumid related et conversations sa initiate või participate sisse. Me do not use SMS jaoks promotional või marketing sõnumid ilma your explicit consent. Standard message ja data rates may apply. Sina saab opt out  SMS sõnumid at any time by replying koos  supported opt-out keyword (jaoks example, “STOP”) või by updating your notification seaded sisse  rakendus.

yourContent.title: Sinu content
yourContent.body: Sina retain rights et your content. Sina grant us necessary rights et operate  teenus (e.g., routing, storage, tõlge).

disclaimer.title: Lahtiütlused ja vastutus
disclaimer.body: Service on provided “as on” ilma warranties. To  fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable jaoks indirect või consequential damages.

changes.title: Muudatused
changes.body: Me may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Kontakt
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell või Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents saab still submit requests under CPRA using  button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Seaded
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). Me don’t use third-party ads cookies. Halda cookies via your brauser’s seaded.

randomChat.title: Juhuslik vestlus
randomChat.description: 'Meet someone uus instantly'. 'Me’ll match sa ja open  temporary vestlus room.' 'Chat anonymously first. Lisa Friend later if it feels right.'
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-et-human chats saab be salvestatud
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Me only store  age range (not your exact date  birth). This on used et keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match koos people (not just RiaBot), set your age band sisse Seaded → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range sisse Profiil → Age & Random Chat et be matched koos people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match koos people (not just RiaBot), set your age band sisse Seaded → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone uus instantly, või vali et vestlus koos Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range sisse Profiil → Age & Random Chat et be matched koos people.

ria.intro: Hei 👋 Mina olen Ria. Mis sul mõttes on?

greetings.long1: Hei {{name}} 👋 Olen siin. Mis sul mõttes on?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 What would sa like et talk about today?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}! I’m kõik ears — what’s up?
greetings.long4: Nice et see sa, {{name}} 👋 What’s on your mind today?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want et vent, ask, või just vestlus?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would sa like et talk about?
greetings.short1: Hei {{name}}, olen ikka siin. Mis toimub?
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else sa wanted et add?
greetings.short3: Back uuesti, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me what’s on your mind.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready et pick up where me left off?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}! Got something uus on your mind?

login.title: Jätka et Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Log sisse et your Chatforia konto
login.subtitle: Log sisse et your Chatforia konto

forgot.title: Forgot Parool
forgot.helper: Sisesta  email sa used et create your Chatforia konto ja me'll send sa  secure link et reset your password.
forgot.genericError: Unable et process request. Palun proovi uuesti sisse  moment.
forgot.sentHelper: If  konto exists koos that email, me've saadetud  password reset link. It may take  few minutes et arrive. Be sure et kontrolli your spam või promotions folder.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on on currently pole saadaval. Use username & password instead.

error.unprocessable: Invalid request. Kontrolli your username/email ja password.
error.deviceLimit: Seade limit reached jaoks  Tasuta plan. Log out on another device või upgrade et Premium et link rohkem devices.

video.deeplinkTip: Tip: sa saab deep link directly et /video?room=room-name.

direct.tipInvite: Tip: Paste  number ja call ilma saving  kontakt. Me’ll invite non-kasutajad by link.

phoneWarning.title: Sinu number on expiring varsti
phoneWarning.body: Sinu number {{number}} hakkab be vabastatud on {{date}} unless reactivated.

support.heading: How saab me help?
support.contactIntro: Me’ll proovi et resolve this instantly. If not, our tiim hakkab follow up.
support.sent: Sõnum saadetud. Me’ll reply by email.
support.sendError: Could not send. E-post support@chatforia.com instead.
support.actionFailed: Could not complete that action. Palun proovi uuesti.
support.escalationMessage: Me couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our tiim hakkab follow up.
support.genericError: Midagi läks valesti. Palun proovi uuesti.
support.resolvedInstantly: Probleem lahendati kohe — piletit pole vaja.

account.q: How do I create või recover my konto?
account.a: Laadi alla  rakendus või use veeb, tap “Loo konto”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Jah. Sõnumid ja kõned on end-et-end encrypted by default. Only sa ja  recipient saab read them.

translate.a: Luba “Automaatne tõlge” sisse Seaded → Appearance & Keel. Me translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs koos minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include kuvatõmmised ja your rakendus versioon.

encryptionRecovery.title: Halda Krüpteerimine
encryptionRecovery.description: Back up, restore, ava, või reset your encryption key.

alert.keyRequiredBody: This brauser cannot currently decrypt your encrypted sõnumid. Taasta, ava, või reset your key et jätka.

unlockPasscode.label: Avamiskood (praegune seade)
unlockPasscode.description: Used et decrypt your keys locally before exporting

restoreBackupPassword.label: Varukoopia password
restoreBackupPassword.description: The password sa created when backing up your key on iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Uus local passcode
newLocalPasscode.description: Protect keys at rest on this brauser

resetLocalPasscode.label: Uus local passcode
resetLocalPasscode.description: Nõutav before resetting so  uus key on kaitstud on this device

errors.restoreIncomplete: Key restore incomplete või incorrect jaoks this konto
errors.noBackup: Selle konto jaoks krüpteeritud varukoopiat ei ole
errors.noServerPublicKey: This konto does not currently expose  server public key
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server backup does not match  current konto encryption key
errors.resetIncomplete: Krüpteerimine reset did not complete correctly

confirm.reset:
Reset encryption jaoks this konto?

Older encrypted sõnumid may become unreadable unless sa restore  original key later.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: This generates  uus encryption key jaoks your konto. Older encrypted sõnumid may become unreadable unless sa restore  original key later.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For meedia inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia on  privacy-first messaging rakendus that makes cross-keel vestlus effortless. Sõnumid on end-et-end encrypted by default, ja built-sisse tõlge supports 100+ keeled sisse real time. Users saab luba kaduvad sõnumid, keep lugemiskinnitused valikuline, ja sync across devices. Saadaval on iOS, Android, ja  veeb.
press.scanTip: Kasutad arvutit? Rakenduse saamiseks skanni telefoniga.

careers.title: Karjäär
careers.intro: Me’re  small founding tiim building Chatforia —  private, global messenger launching on veeb, iOS, ja Android. If sa care about privacy, encryption, ja delightful user experiences, me’d love et hear alates sa.
careers.openRoles: Ava founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobiil Engineer (iOS), Mobiil Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Turvalisus & Krüpteerimine Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How et apply: Use  button below et email your resume ja links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Abi build  foundation   uus global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across veeb, iOS, ja Android.
• Work directly koos  founder on architecture ja product direction.
• Own high-impact areas   stack: messaging, hääl, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Liitu at  beginning — before  user base scales.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia on  secure, multilingual messenger koos läbiv krüpteerimine, instant tõlge, ja hääl/video calling. Our mission on simple: help people connect—safely, privately, ja across keeled.

values.access_aria: Access jaoks kõik: Automaatne tõlge 100+ keeled.
values.control_aria: Control: Kaduvad sõnumid ja lugemiskinnitused on valikuline.

about.howDescription: Sõnumid on encrypted on your device before they leave it. Tõlge, backups, ja device sync on designed et minimize what our servers saab see.

advertise.title: Advertise koos Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging kasutajad koos tasteful, brand-safe placements. Me offer banner inventory sisse high-visibility spots, sponsorships, ja house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Me also serve inventory via Google AdSense. Sina saab target Chatforia koos publisher ID {{pubId}}, või use  form below jaoks direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Me also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships on saadaval—use  form below.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Me’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about your campaign ja me’ll recommend placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency ja dwell time sisse vestlus UI
why.deals: Direct deals või programmatic via AdSense/Google Reklaamid

form.submittedMsg: Thanks! Sinu inquiry on on its way. Me’ll follow up shortly.
form.missingRequired: Palun fill sisse name, email, ja message.
form.successToast: Thanks! Me’ll be sisse touch varsti.
form.mailtoInfo: Opening your email client et send  inquiry…
